languages.text: "Таких чудовищ необходимо истреблять. Это я понимаю, очень даже хорошо. Получается, для этого мы, гвардейцы и нужны".
"Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."
languages.original_text: "Таких чудовищ необходимо истреблять. Это я понимаю, очень даже хорошо. Получается, для этого мы, гвардейцы и нужны".

traits.locale_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we guardsmen are for."
"Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."
"I see. Freedom for the one... I understand, all too well, in fact. Such monsters must be exterminated. That's what we're for, eh, Lord Captain?"
"Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we guardsmen are for."
"Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

languages.text: 「なるほど。一人だけの自由…その意味は、よく理解している。そのような怪物は、根絶されるべきだ。それが我々の使命である。そうだろう、艦長様？」
languages.original_text: "I see. Freedom for the one... I understand, all too well, in fact. Such monsters must be exterminated. That's what we're for, eh, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: "Böyle canavarlar yok edilmeli. Anlıyorum, hem de çok iyi anlıyorum. Görünüşe göre biz Muhafızların amacı da bu."
languages.original_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle canavarlar yok edilmeli. Anlıyorum, hem de çok iyi anlıyorum. Görünüşe göre biz Muhafızların amacı da bu."

languages.text: “这种怪物必须赶尽杀绝。我太明白这一点了。看来这正是我们这些卫兵存在的意义。”
languages.original_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

traits.locale_text: “这种怪物必须赶尽杀绝。我太明白这一点了。看来这正是我们这些卫兵存在的意义。”

languages.text: "Solche Monster müssen ausgelöscht werden. Tatsächlich verstehe ich das nur allzu gut. Ich schätze, genau dazu sind wir Soldaten da."
languages.original_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

traits.locale_text: "Solche Monster müssen ausgelöscht werden. Tatsächlich verstehe ich das nur allzu gut. Ich schätze, genau dazu sind wir Soldaten da."

languages.text: « De tels monstres doivent être exterminés. Je comprends. Je ne comprends que trop bien. Après tout, c'est notre raison d'être. »
languages.original_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

traits.locale_text: « De tels monstres doivent être exterminés. Je comprends. Je ne comprends que trop bien. Après tout, c'est notre raison d'être. »

languages.text: «Esos monstruos deben ser exterminados. Lo entiendo perfectamente, de hecho. Parece que para eso precisamente existe la Guardia Imperial».
languages.original_text: "Such monsters must be exterminated. I understand, all too well, in fact. It seems that's exactly what we Guardsmen are for."

traits.locale_text: «Esos monstruos deben ser exterminados. Lo entiendo perfectamente, de hecho. Parece que para eso precisamente existe la Guardia Imperial».
